channel.title: Fireworks AI
channel.description: Fireworks AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: GLM 5.2 is live on Fireworks inference, day zero.
item.description: Experience the power of GLM 5.2, now live on Fireworks. As the premier choice for coding and long-horizon agentic tasks, GLM 5.2 is built to handle complex workflows with a robust 1M-token context window. Whether you’re managing long-running autonomous agents or high-stakes coding projects, this MIT-licensed model delivers frontier-grade performance on the Fireworks production stack. We’ve validated GLM 5.2 on our own infrastructure, achieving industry-leading results on benchmarks like…
